parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Streamlabs destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise strmlabs:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway channel skips Apprise and POSTs a native Streamlabs Alerts API form payload directly to streamlabs.com.
parameters.gateway_body_template: access_token=${ customer_secrets.STREAMLABS_ACCESS_TOKEN }&message={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(( (_body.title or "") ~= "" and (_body.body or "") ~= "") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Streamlabs destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to Streamlabs Alerts API (no Apprise)

access_token_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Streamlabs access token
